# PID

Classical feedback controller that combines proportional, integral, and derivative error terms.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Control</span>
  <span>feedback control, tracking, classical control</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Set target and controller gains] --> B[Measure current output]
    B --> C[Compute tracking error]
    C --> D[Update integral and derivative terms]
    D --> E[Compute PID control command]
    E --> F[Apply actuator input]
    F --> G{Continue control loop?}
    G -- Yes --> B
    G -- No --> H[Stop]
```

## Notes

- Integral action removes steady-state error when the loop is well tuned.
- Derivative action can improve damping but is sensitive to noise.
